config.neo4j.topic.cypher.ctsserver.CTS_DataCen: call apoc.do.case([event.op = 'c','MERGE (n:Evidence { EvidenceID: event.after.EvidenceID }) ON CREATE SET n = event.after RETURN COUNT(*)',event.op = 'u','MATCH (n:Evidence { EvidenceID: event.before.EvidenceID }) SET n = event.after RETURN COUNT(*)',event.op = 'd','MATCH (n:Evidence { EvidenceID: event.before.EvidenceID }) SET n:NeedDelete'],'',{event:event}) yield value return value
config.neo4j.topic.cypher.ctsserver.CTS_Admin.S: call apoc.do.case([event.op = 'c','MERGE (n:Subscriber {SubscriberID: event.after.SubscriberID }) ON CREATE SET n = event.after RETURN COUNT(*)',event.op = 'u','MATCH (n:Subscriber {SubscriberID: event.before.SubscriberID }) SET n = event.after RETURN COUNT(*)',event.op = 'd','MATCH (n:Subscriber { SubscriberID: event.before.SubscriberID }) SET n:NeedDelete'],'',{event:event}) yield value return value
config.neo4j.topic.cypher.ctsserver.CTS_DataCen: call apoc.do.case([ event.op = 'c','MERGE (n:CTSCustomer { CTSCustID: event.after.CTSCustID }) ON CREATE SET n = event.after ON MATCH SET n = event.after WITH n, event MERGE (s:Subscriber {SubscriberID: event.after.SubscriberID}) MERGE (n)-[r:BELONG_TO_SUB]->(s) ON CREATE SET r.CreatedDate = datetime() MERGE (st:StaticList {ItemID: event.after.CustStatusID, ListID: 1}) MERGE (n)-[r2:HAS_STATUS]->(st) ON CREATE SET r2.CreatedDate = datetime() RETURN COUNT(*)' ,event.op = 'u','MERGE (n:CTSCustomer {CTSCustID: event.before.CTSCustID }) SET n = event.after WITH n, event OPTIONAL MATCH (n)-[ro:BELONG_TO_SUB]->(s:Subscriber {SubscriberID: event.before.SubscriberID}) DELETE ro WITH n,event OPTIONAL MATCH (n)-[r2o:HAS_STATUS]->(st:StaticList {ItemID: event.before.CustStatusID, ListID: 1}) DELETE r2o WITH n,event MERGE (s:Subscriber {SubscriberID: event.after.SubscriberID}) MERGE (n)-[rn:BELONG_TO_SUB]->(s) ON CREATE SET rn.CreatedDate = datetime() MERGE (st:StaticList {ItemID: event.after.CustStatusID, ListID: 1}) MERGE (n)-[r2n:HAS_STATUS]->(st) ON CREATE SET r2n.CreatedDate = datetime() RETURN COUNT(*)',event.op = 'd','MATCH (n:CTSCustomer {CTSCustID: event.before.CTSCustID }) DETACH DELETE n'],'',{event:event}) yield value return value

call apoc.do.case([event.op = 'c','MERGE (n:CustomerCategory { CategoryID: event.after.CategoryID }) ON CREATE SET n = event.after RETURN COUNT(*)',event.op = 'u','MATCH (n:CustomerCategory { CategoryID: event.before.CategoryID }) SET n = event.after RETURN COUNT(*)',event.op = 'd','MATCH (n:CustomerCategory { CategoryID: event.before.CategoryID }) SET n:NeedDelete'],'',{event:event}) yield value return value

call apoc.do.case([event.op = 'c','MERGE (n:StaticList { ListID: event.after.ListID, ItemID: event.after.ItemID }) ON CREATE SET n = event.after  ON MATCH SET n = event.after RETURN COUNT(*)',event.op = 'u','MATCH (n:StaticList { ListID: event.before.ListID, ItemID: event.before.ItemID }) SET n = event.after RETURN COUNT(*)',event.op = 'd','MATCH (n:StaticList { ListID: event.before.ListID, ItemID: event.before.ItemID }) SET n:NeedDelete'],'',{event:event}) yield value return value

call apoc.do.case([ event.op = 'c','MERGE (c:CTSCustomer {CTSCustID: event.after.CTSCustID}) MERGE (d:Device {DeviceId: event.after.DCSDeviceID}) MERGE (c)-[r:USED_DEVICE {CTSAssDevID: event.after.CTSAssDevID}]->(d) ON CREATE SET r.SubscriberID = event.after.SubscriberID, r.CreatedTime = event.after.CreatedTime, r.InsertTime = event.after.InsertTime c:CookFAD' ,event.op = 'u','MATCH (:CTSCustomer {CTSCustID: event.before.CTSCustID})-[ro:USED_DEVICE]->(:Device {DeviceId: event.before.DCSDeviceID}) DELETE ro WITH event MERGE (c:CTSCustomer {CTSCustID: event.after.CTSCustID}) MERGE (d:Device {DeviceId: event.after.DCSDeviceID}) MERGE (c)-[r:USED_DEVICE {CTSAssDevID: event.after.CTSAssDevID}]->(d) ON CREATE SET r.SubscriberID = event.after.SubscriberID, r.CreatedTime = event.after.CreatedTime, r.InsertTime = event.after.InsertTime c:CookFAD' ,event.op = 'd','MATCH (c:CTSCustomer {CTSCustID: event.before.CTSCustID})-[r:USED_DEVICE]->(d:Device {DeviceId: event.before.DCSDeviceID}) DELETE r'],'',{event:event}) yield value return value

call apoc.do.case([ event.op = 'c','MATCH (c:CTSCustomer {CTSCustID: event.after.FromCTSCustID}) MATCH (c2:CTSCustomer {CTSCustID: event.after.ToCTSCustID}) MERGE (c)-[r:ADD_MANUALLY]->(c2) ON CREATE SET r.Remark = event.after.Remark,r.CreatedDate = event.after.CreatedDate,r.CreatedBy = event.after.CreatedBy RETURN r' ,event.op = 'u','MATCH (CTSCustomer {CTSCustID: event.before.FromCTSCustID})-[oldR:ADD_MANUALLY]->(:CTSCustomer {CTSCustID: event.before.ToCTSCustID}) DELETE oldR WITH event MATCH (c:CTSCustomer {CTSCustID: event.after.FromCTSCustID}) MATCH (c2:CTSCustomer {CTSCustID: event.after.ToCTSCustID}) MERGE (c)-[r:ADD_MANUALLY]->(c2) ON CREATE SET r.Remark = event.after.Remark,r.CreatedDate = event.after.CreatedDate,r.CreatedBy = event.after.CreatedBy RETURN r' ,event.op = 'd','MATCH (:CTSCustomer {CTSCustID: event.before.FromCTSCustID})-[oldR:ADD_MANUALLY]->(:CTSCustomer {CTSCustID: event.before.ToCTSCustID}) DELETE oldR'],'',{event:event}) yield value return value

call apoc.do.case([ event.op = 'c','MATCH (c:CTSCustomer {CTSCustID: event.after.FromCTSCustID}) MATCH (c2:CTSCustomer {CTSCustID: event.after.ToCTSCustID}) MERGE (c)-[r:HAS_EXCEPTION]->(c2) ON CREATE SET r.Remark = event.after.Remark,r.CreatedDate = event.after.CreatedDate,r.CreatedBy = event.after.CreatedBy RETURN r',event.op = 'u','MATCH (:CTSCustomer {CTSCustID: event.before.FromCTSCustID})-[oldR:HAS_EXCEPTION]->(:CTSCustomer {CTSCustID: event.before.ToCTSCustID}) DELETE oldR WITH event MATCH (c:CTSCustomer {CTSCustID: event.after.FromCTSCustID}) MATCH (c2:CTSCustomer {CTSCustID: event.after.ToCTSCustID}) MERGE (c)-[r:HAS_EXCEPTION]->(c2) ON CREATE SET r.Remark = event.after.Remark,r.CreatedDate = event.after.CreatedDate,r.CreatedBy = event.after.CreatedBy RETURN r' ,event.op = 'd','MATCH (:CTSCustomer {CTSCustID: event.before.FromCTSCustID})-[oldR:HAS_EXCEPTION]->(:CTSCustomer {CTSCustID: event.before.ToCTSCustID}) DELETE oldR' ] ,'',{event:event}) yield value return value

call apoc.do.case([event.op = 'c','MERGE (c:CTSCustomer {CustID: event.after.CustID}) MERGE (ct:CustomerCategory {CategoryID: event.after.CategoryID }) MERGE (c)-[r:HAS_CATEGORY]->(ct) ON CREATE SET r.SportGroupID = event.after.SportGroupID,r.Remark = event.after.Remark, r.CreatedDate = event.after.CreatedDate ,r.CreatedBy = event.after.CreatedBy, r.LastModifiedDate = event.after.LastModifiedDate, r.LastModifiedBy = event.after.LastModifiedBy, r.LastScannedDate = event.after.LastScannedDate RETURN r', event.op = 'u','MATCH (:CTSCustomer {CustID: event.before.CustID})-[oldR:HAS_CATEGORY]->(:CustomerCategory {CategoryID: event.before.CategoryID}) DELETE oldR WITH event MERGE (c:CTSCustomer {CustID: event.after.CustID}) MERGE (ct:CustomerCategory {CategoryID: event.after.CategoryID }) MERGE (c)-[r:HAS_CATEGORY]->(ct) ON CREATE SET r.SportGroupID = event.after.SportGroupID, r.Remark = event.after.Remark, r.CreatedDate = event.after.CreatedDate,  r.CreatedBy = event.after.CreatedBy, r.LastModifiedDate = event.after.LastModifiedDate, r.LastModifiedBy = event.after.LastModifiedBy, r.LastScannedDate = event.after.LastScannedDate RETURN r', event.op = 'd','MATCH (:CTSCustomer {CustID: event.before.CustID})-[oldR:HAS_CATEGORY]->(:CustomerCategory {CategoryID: event.before.CategoryID}) DELETE oldR'],'',{event:event}) yield value return value

call apoc.do.case([event.op = 'c' AND event.after.Level = 0,'MATCH (c:CTSCustomer {CTSCustID: event.after.CTSCustID}) MATCH (e:Evidence {EvidenceID: event.after.EvidenceID}) MERGE (c)-[r:HAS_EVIDENCE]->(e) ON CREATE SET r.Remark = event.after.Remark, r.CreatedDate = event.after.CreatedDate, r.CreatedBy = event.after.CreatedBy', event.op = 'u' AND event.before.Level = 0,'MATCH (c:CTSCustomer {CTSCustID: event.before.CTSCustID})-[r:HAS_EVIDENCE]->(e:Evidence {EvidenceID: event.before.EvidenceID}) SET r.Remark = event.before.Remark, r.CreatedDate = event.before.CreatedDate, r.CreatedBy = event.before.CreatedBy', event.op = 'd' AND event.before.Level = 0,'MATCH (c:CTSCustomer {CTSCustID: event.before.CTSCustID})-[r:HAS_EVIDENCE]->(e:Evidence {EvidenceID: event.before.EvidenceID}) DELETE r'],'',{event:event}) yield value return value
